UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALADINI, GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CURRY, TIFFANY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 4232 JUDAH STREET, #1 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94122 SAN FRANCISCO, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT CURRY, TIFFANY HEARING SET FOR OCT-21-2015 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

ORDER GRANTING STAY OF EXECUTION

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CURRY, TIFFANY

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-21-2015 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT TIFFANY CURRY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT CURRY, TIFFANY
